tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), suggesting significant renal dysfunction, possibly with tubular involvement. The low urine specific gravity further supports impaired renal concentrating ability. No evidence of urinary tract infection is present. Recommend prompt nephrology evaluation for further assessment and management.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
